idea.title: Style Mixer
idea.hook: Each round shows the same scene in two visual styles — pick the matching tile from a grid of 9 candidates before your guesses run out.
idea.hook_ru: Каждый раунд показывает одну сцену в двух стилях — выберите подходящую плитку из 9, пока не кончились догадки.
idea.prototype: Single canvas-drawn scene (procedural primitives — shapes, colors) rendered twice in two distinct visual styles (pixel-art, neon, flat, sketch, watercolor, isometric). Target scene at top; 9-tile 3x3 grid below — 1 is the same scene in the other style; 8 are decoys with similar primitive count but different content/positions. Tap correct match. Start with 7 wrong-guess tokens. Win = 20 correct matches. Lose = tokens depleted.
idea.mutation_of: game_idea/1585 'Lost & Found' (mixing 2D/3D/pixel/clay styles) + unity_assets_1/1019 (Screen Space Reflections shader signal — cheap screen-space VFX selling a simple loop).
idea.why_novel: No portal ships a pure visual-style-recognition puzzle that uses procedurally-drawn primitives as the canonical scene representation. Daily-seed leaderboard friendly, vanilla canvas only, no external sprites needed.
idea.non_timer_pressure: guess tokens budget (7 wrong picks allowed; small +1 refund every 5 correct matches caps at 7)
idea.lose_condition: tokens reaches 0 after a wrong pick is registered

sources.title: game_idea/1585 — Lost & Found style mixing concept
sources.snippet: Style-mixing idea: render the same scene in multiple styles (2D, 3D, pixel, clay). Direct seed for the visual-recognition puzzle.

sources.title: unity_assets_1/1019 — REFLECT (SSR shader free)
sources.snippet: Cheap screen-space VFX sells a simple mechanic. We compress that idea into 2D canvas filters per tile — pixelation, neon glow, sketch hatching, watercolor wash, isometric squash.

sources.title: Style Mixer — synthesized digest pick
sources.snippet: Top of screen: target scene rendered in style A. Below: 3x3 grid of the same scene in 9 different styles. Pick the tile that matches the target. Wrong pick burns a guess. Procedural scene composition (canvas-drawn primitives styled per filter).

synthesizer_brief: Pick #5 in today's digest. The contribution is a recognition puzzle whose 'art' is purely procedural primitives styled by render-time filters — gives infinite content scaling with zero asset pipeline cost. Daily-seed leaderboard friendly; mass-appeal hook (style transfer is a familiar internet artifact).

alternatives.title: Ice Quarry Foreman
alternatives.hook: Tap a frozen tile to shatter it into chunks, chaining cracks to clear the quarry before your pickaxe budget runs out.
alternatives.why_novel: Top-down readable, daily-seed friendly for shareable scores; fakes mesh fracture via chunked tiles.

alternatives.title: Cargo Yard Dispatch
alternatives.hook: Route incoming freight cars to the right warehouse by flipping junctions before the queue overflows the inbound track.
alternatives.why_novel: Non-timer pressure via track capacity; portal-friendly compression of full railway sim.

alternatives.title: Overcharge Donut
alternatives.hook: Hold to charge the launcher, release inside the blinking sweet-spot — overshoot it and the donut detonates instead of flying.
alternatives.mutation_of: Tim's IDEAS.md unbuilt list — charge-release timing on a launcher.
alternatives.why_novel: Hold-charge timing as primary pressure; donut theme fits portfolio rhythm.

alternatives.title: Satisfying Spill
alternatives.hook: Drag your mop across a tiled floor to absorb spreading spills before they reach the room's edges.
alternatives.why_novel: Spread-containment on continuous canvas; avoids overlap with Apartment Cleaner and Ice Sweeper.
